title: pyrus raunii
intro: Pyrus raunii, also known as the Korean mountain ash or Pyrus rufa, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus raunii include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Pyrus raunii often involve the plant's bark, leaves, or roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
